division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: Environmental license plates shall be issued only to the registered owner or lessee of the vehicle on which they are to be displayed.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 8.5. Environmental License Plates [5100 - 5112]
##### § 5104

Environmental license plates shall be issued only to the registered owner or lessee of the vehicle on which they are to be displayed.

*(Amended by Stats. 1973, Ch. 265.)*

subsections.text: Environmental license plates shall be issued only to the registered owner or lessee of the vehicle on which they are to be displayed.
